# Simplified Management

> Simplified Management is a centralized property management software (PMS) and channel manager for vacation rentals, serviced apartments, boutique hotels, and multi-property operators. It centralizes listings, synchronizes calendars in real time, automates distribution across 50+ OTA channels, and automatically splits partner payouts for co-owned properties. Built by B2B InDemand in Viman Nagar, Pune, India.

## What it does
- Centralized PMS: manage every listing, reservation, and task from one dashboard.
- Channel Manager: distribute and sync across 50+ OTAs (Airbnb, Booking.com, Agoda, Expedia, Vrbo, MakeMyTrip, Goibibo and more).
- Real-time Calendar Sync: keep availability synced across channels to eliminate double bookings.
- Partner Payouts: allocate properties to partners and split earnings and expenses automatically per booking.

## Who it is for
Property managers, vacation rental operators, serviced apartment providers, boutique hotels, and multi-property operators running roughly 50 to 500+ properties.

## Pricing
Plans are banded by portfolio size (Starter: up to 50 listings; Growth: 50–200; Scale: 200–500+). Exact pricing is quoted during a demo.
